bugs.title: Bookings screen crash: Cannot read properties of undefined
bugs.description: Bookings screen crashed - booking.companion could be undefined
bugs.fix: (v2) Both getById() and getMyBookings() in api.ts now extract rawCompanion = b.companion ?? {} and build companion object with explicit safe defaults. PR #31 deployed.

bugs.title: Repeated warnings spam console on each navigation
bugs.description: Expo Router internal behavior. Warnings do not affect functionality.

bugs.title: Cloudflare RUM requests failing
bugs.description: Cloudflare infrastructure configuration, not app code. RUM is optional analytics.

bugs.title: Protected routes redirect without feedback
bugs.description: Accessing protected routes without authentication redirects to welcome page without clear feedback.
bugs.fix: Fixed (tabs)/_layout.tsx to use Redirect href='/(auth)/welcome?redirect=1'. PR #36 deployed.

bugs.title: Hourly Rate accepts negative values
bugs.description: Companion Hourly Rate field accepts negative numbers. Critical business logic failure.
bugs.fix: Backend: UpdateUserDto with @Min(1) @Max(9999). Frontend: validation in edit-profile and profile-setup. PR #38 deployed.

bugs.title: Hourly Rate accepts unreasonably large values
bugs.description: Hourly Rate field has no maximum value validation.
bugs.fix: Backend: UpdateUserDto @Max(9999). Frontend: validation < 10000. PR #38 deployed.

bugs.title: Hourly Rate accepts zero value
bugs.description: Hourly Rate field accepts 0, meaning companion provides service for free.
bugs.fix: Backend: UpdateUserDto @Min(1). Frontend: validation rate > 0. PR #38 deployed.

bugs.title: Layout completely broken - text displays vertically letter by letter
bugs.description: On web, all text was displaying vertically one letter per line.
bugs.fix: Fixed _layout.tsx: added width:100% and minWidth:320 to contentStyle for web platform.

bugs.title: Visual design outdated - needs modern style refresh
bugs.description: Current design looks dated. Colors, fonts, and overall styling need to be updated.
bugs.action_required: Create 3-4 HTML style mockups with different modern design directions for user review

bugs.title: Profile page infinite loading on web (expo-location hangs)
bugs.description: Companion profile page shows 'Loading profile...' forever on web. expo-location hangs.
bugs.fix: Wrapped location request in Promise.race with 5-second timeout.

bugs.title: Registration creates demo user instead of real user
bugs.description: Register screen calls completeOnboarding without passing email from form.
bugs.fix: Added email field to OnboardingData interface. Register screen now passes formData.email.

bugs.title: Booking form submit button non-functional on web
bugs.description: Alert.alert() is a no-op on web. Success callback was inside Alert.alert.
bugs.fix: Created cross-platform showAlert() helper that uses window.alert on web.

bugs.title: Terms/Privacy pages crash on web
bugs.description: Terms/Privacy links opened non-existent external URLs.
bugs.fix: Created in-app /terms and /privacy routes. Added to PUBLIC_ROUTES in NavigationGuard. PR #39 deployed.

bugs.title: All Alert.alert calls are no-op on web (18 screens affected)
bugs.description: Alert.alert() from React Native does nothing on web.
bugs.fix: Replaced remaining 12 Alert.alert calls with showAlert/showConfirm. PR #40 deployed.

bugs.title: Chat sendMessage fails silently
bugs.description: If sendMessage() fails, message is cleared from input without error feedback.
bugs.fix: Added try-catch around sendMessage. On failure: restores message text, shows alert.

bugs.title: Post-login redirect loop: (seeker-verify) route missing on web
bugs.description: After OTP, router tried (seeker-verify) layout which has no web route. Infinite redirect loop.
bugs.fix: Replaced conditional Stack.Screen with NavigationGuard + static registration. PR #33 deployed.

bugs.title: OTP verify fails: email state lost on OTP page
bugs.description: pendingEmail in auth store lost through navigation from login to OTP on web.
bugs.fix: Fixed auth store persistence for pendingEmail through navigation.

bugs.title: Chat shows 'undefined' for non-existent companion
bugs.description: Opening /chat/[id] with non-existent conversation shows 'Say hello to undefined!'
bugs.fix: Added 3-level name fallback and error state for missing conversation. PR #37 deployed.

bugs.title: Seeker profile page missing role badge, bio, and prominent location
bugs.description: The seeker's own profile page is a settings-style view. Missing role badge, bio display, prominent location.

bugs.title: Chat screen unreachable on web: router.push redirects to /male
bugs.description: router.push from any tab screen to non-tab routes (chat, profile, settings) silently redirects to /male on web. Root cause: fragment children in (tabs)/_layout.tsx.
bugs.fix: Replaced fragment children in (tabs)/_layout.tsx with direct Screen children + options.href=null for wrong-role screens. Fixed navigation in browse, messages, chat, profile, favorites. PR #44 deployed.

bugs.title: Bookings 'Message' button passes booking ID to chat instead of companion user ID
bugs.description: bookings.tsx passed booking.id instead of booking.companion.id to chat route.
bugs.fix: Changed to booking.companion?.id || booking.companion_id. PR #42 deployed.

bugs.title: Browse 'View Profile' navigates to seeker's own profile instead of /profile/[id]
bugs.description: View Profile on companion card resolves to /male/profile instead of /profile/[companion-id].
bugs.fix: Fixed as part of navigation overhaul in PR #44. Updated browse.tsx to use correct pathname.

bugs.title: Messages list: last message always shows hardcoded text
bugs.description: Last message preview hardcoded as 'No messages yet' regardless of actual content.
bugs.fix: Full-stack fix: backend added lastMessage relation + response field, frontend uses chat.lastMessage. PR #43 deployed.

bugs.title: Messages tab has no unread count badge on tab bar icon
bugs.description: CustomTabBar renders Messages tab without unread count badge. messagesStore has unreadCount but it's not displayed.
bugs.fix: Added red badge with unread count to Messages tab icon in CustomTabBar. PR #46 deployed.

bugs.title: (tabs)/_layout.tsx fragment children break ALL tab navigation on web
bugs.description: Fragment (<>...</>) inside <Tabs> breaks Expo Router. Tabs map to wrong screens, push navigation fails.
bugs.fix: Replaced fragments with direct Screen children + options.href=null for conditional hiding. PR #44 deployed.

bugs.title: Backend approveVerification does not sync verificationStatus on User entity
bugs.description: approveVerification() set isVerified=true but not verificationStatus, blocking verified users from app.
bugs.fix: Added verificationStatus: APPROVED to usersService.update() in approveVerification(). PR #41 deployed.

bugs.title: Bookings API filter=upcoming returns all bookings including cancelled
bugs.description: GET /api/bookings?filter=upcoming returns ALL bookings regardless of filter. Should filter by status.
bugs.fix: Added findByUserFiltered() with proper status+date conditions for upcoming/pending/past filters. PR #47 deployed.

bugs.title: Companion profile shows $0/hr despite API returning correct rate
bugs.description: On onboarding profile setup, the hourly rate displays as $0 on the companion's profile even when API returns a valid hourlyRate. Likely a frontend rendering issue in profile-setup or companion card display.

bugs.title: Favorites store has no persistence - favorites lost on refresh
bugs.description: favoritesStore uses plain Zustand without persist middleware. Favorites lost on every page reload.
bugs.fix: Added Zustand persist middleware with AsyncStorage to favoritesStore. PR #45 deployed.

bugs.title: PUT /bookings/:id/complete endpoint missing
bugs.description: UC-025 requires a booking completion endpoint. Backend only has confirm and cancel. Complete endpoint needed for marking bookings as finished after the date.
bugs.fix: Added PUT /bookings/:id/complete endpoint with status/ownership/date validation. PR #48 deployed.

bugs.title: Reviews page unreachable on web via direct navigation
bugs.description: The /reviews/[id] route renders briefly then redirects to /male. Stack screen navigation from tabs broken. Reviews UI exists but is inaccessible.

bugs.title: Demo mode bypass: API failure silently logs in fake user
bugs.description: login.tsx created a fake demo user and bypassed auth entirely when startAuth() API call failed. Any network error gave unauthenticated access.
bugs.fix: Removed demo user fallback. Now shows error message on API failure.
Replaced hardcoded stats with real data from bookingsStore. PR #55.
bugs.title: Profile stats (Dates/Total Spent) are hardcoded for all users
bugs.description: profile.tsx lines 22-25 hardcode totalDates=8, totalSpent=1850. Every user sees same stats regardless of actual booking history.

bugs.fix: Added onPress handler to Notifications menu item. PR #55.
bugs.title: Notifications menu item has no onPress handler
bugs.description: Profile tab Notifications menu item is not tappable. The notifications settings screen exists at /settings/notifications.tsx but is unreachable.

bugs.fix: Added explicit @Get('unread') route before :userId wildcard. PR #54.
bugs.title: GET /api/messages/unread returns 500 - URL collision with :userId wildcard
bugs.description: Route /messages/unread is caught by @Get(':userId') wildcard, crashes TypeORM on invalid UUID. Correct endpoint is /messages/unread-count.

bugs.fix: Added ParseUUIDPipe to :id param in getUserById(). PR #54.
bugs.title: GET /api/users/settings returns 500 - URL collision with :id wildcard
bugs.description: Route /users/settings is caught by @Get(':id') wildcard, crashes TypeORM on invalid UUID. No frontend code calls this but it's a potential issue.

bugs.title: New filter chip in Browse has no backend effect
bugs.description: quickFilters includes 'New' but fetchCompanions() has no handler for it. Clicking New shows same results as All.

bugs.title: Companions pagination page parameter broken
bugs.description: GET /companions?page=2&limit=5 returns same results as page=1. Offset not applied.

bugs.title: Nearby filter - distance always null, no geo coordinates stored
bugs.description: Companions don't store lat/lng coordinates. Nearby chip sends sortBy=distance but all distance values are null.

bugs.title: Availability filter in FilterModal has no API implementation
bugs.description: FilterModal offers availability options (today/this_week/weekend) but companionsApi.search() doesn't pass availability to API.
